mapper.sql: SELECT 'PAIR' AS VALIDATION_TYPE, r.RESULT_ID, r.COMPARISON_ID AS RULE_ID, c.COMPARISON_NAME AS RULE_NAME, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.SYBASE_ROW_COUNT AS LEFT_ROW_COUNT, r.ORACLE_ROW_COUNT AS RIGHT_ROW_COUNT, COALESCE(r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE) AS SUMMARY FROM BM_QUERY_COMPARISON_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_COMPARISON c ON r.COMPARISON_ID = c.COMPARISON_ID UNION ALL SELECT 'SINGLE' AS VALIDATION_TYPE, r.RESULT_ID, r.EXPECTATION_ID AS RULE_ID, e.EXPECTATION_NAME AS RULE_NAME, r.RESULT_STATUS, r.REQUESTED_BY, r.REQUESTED_AT, r.STARTED_AT, r.FINISHED_AT, r.ACTUAL_ROW_COUNT AS LEFT_ROW_COUNT, NULL AS RIGHT_ROW_COUNT, COALESCE(r.MISMATCH_SUMMARY, r.ERROR_MESSAGE) AS SUMMARY FROM BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION_RESULT r JOIN BM_QUERY_EXPECTATION e ON r.EXPECTATION_ID = e.EXPECTATION_ID
